text: Item 1. Security and Issuer. This statement on Schedule 13D is filed by Apex Capital Management, LLC ("Apex Capital") with respect to shares of Common Stock, par value $0.01 per share (the "Common Stock"), of Target Industries, Inc. (the "Issuer"). As of February 10, 2026, Apex Capital beneficially owned 12,450,000 shares of Common Stock, representing approximately 9.8% of the outstanding shares of Common Stock of the Issuer based on 127,040,816 shares outstanding as reported in the Issuer's most recently filed Form 10-Q.

extractions.extraction_text: Apex Capital beneficially owned 12,450,000 shares of Common Stock, representing approximately 9.8% of the outstanding shares of Common Stock of the Issuer

text: Item 4. Purpose of Transaction. Apex Capital acquired the shares of Common Stock reported herein for investment purposes. Apex Capital believes that the Common Stock is undervalued and that the Issuer's board of directors should explore strategic alternatives, including a potential sale of the Issuer, to maximize value for all stockholders. Apex Capital has had and intends to continue to have discussions with the board of directors and management of the Issuer regarding capital allocation, operational efficiency improvements, and strategic alternatives. Apex Capital reserves the right to change its plans at any time and to take any and all actions that it deems appropriate.

extractions.extraction_text: Apex Capital believes that the Common Stock is undervalued and that the Issuer's board of directors should explore strategic alternatives, including a potential sale of the Issuer, to maximize value for all stockholders
